---
title: "Publications"
description: "Research papers, policy briefs, and academic writing"
listing:
  - id: publications-list
    contents: publications.yml
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      description: "Venue / Co-authors"
      title: "Paper"
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

Research papers, policy briefs, and academic writing. Titles link to the original publication or PDF.

::: {#publications-list}
:::
